summary: Implemented AuthManager class with tenant_access_token and user_access_token support. Features: token caching, expiry detection with configurable buffer (default 300s), auto-refresh on expiry, unified get_headers() for both modes, injectable HTTP client for testing. All 14 unittest cases pass covering TokenInfo expiry, tenant token fetch/cache/refresh, user token set/get/refresh, refresh_token rotation, error handling, and header generation.
